zh.Battle Of Wakefield, Sandal Magna, West: 英國英格蘭越可爾桑達爾 馬尼亞
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Bonville於1423年4月3日出生在英國戴文書特時，他的父親William Bonville30歲，母親Margaret Grey26歲。他於大約1441年與Elizabeth Harington在英國戴文書特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1460年12月31日在英國英格蘭越可爾桑達爾 馬尼亞享年37歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bonville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of   Bonneville   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Bonneville
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francois, Liette, Normand, Pierre.
French: habitational name from any of numerous places called Bonneville, from Old French bonne ‘good’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Bonville .
Altered form of French Bonnevialle: habitational name from Bonnevialle in the central part of France.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Bonville was born on 3 April 1423, in Shute, Devon, England, his father, William Bonville, was 30 and his mother, Margaret Grey, was 26. He married Elizabeth Harington about 1441, in Shute, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 31 December 1460, in Sandal Magna, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Bonville est né le 3 avril 1423, à Shute, Devon, Angleterre, son père, William Bonville, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret Grey, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Harington environ 1441, à Shute, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 31 décembre 1460, à Sandal Magna, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William Bonvilleが1423年4月3日にイギリスデボンシュトで生まれた時，父William Bonvilleは30歳，母Margaret Greyは26歳であった。約1441年にイギリスデボンシュトでElizabeth Haringtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1460年12月31日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアサンダル マグナで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Bonville(이)가 1423년 4월 3일 영국 데폰 슈트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bonville(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Grey(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1441년 영국 데폰 슈트에서 Elizabeth Harington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1460년 12월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 샌다 매그나에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Bonville родился 3 апреля 1423 г. в местности шут, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени William Bonville было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Grey, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Harington около 1441 г. в местности шут, девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 31 декабря 1460 г. в местности сэндаль магна, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет.
